issues.detail: The skill does not include error handling for rate limiting, expired codes, or invalid numbers in the provided code snippets.
The skill assumes a Node.js/TypeScript environment with Next.js API routes, limiting compatibility with other platforms.

scenarios.name: Add SMS-based 2FA to a Next.js signup flow
scenarios.rationale: Baseline rolls a custom OTP with Redis storage and raw SMS, missing the Verify API entirely; treatment uses verify.v2.services().verifications.create and verificationChecks.create with channel:'sms' and E.164 numbers.

scenarios.name: Handle incoming SMS and auto-reply with order status
scenarios.rationale: Baseline returns JSON from the webhook with the wrong content type and ignores TwiML; treatment parses formData for From/Body, builds twilio.twiml.MessagingResponse, and returns text/xml.
